title: Goldman Sachs tops estimates on record equities trading — here's why the stock is falling
summary: Goldman Sachs posted record equities trading revenue for the first quarter, helping propel the overall firm to its second-highest quarterly revenue.

title: First Iranian Tankers Reach India Since 2019 Sanctions Cutoff
summary: Two Iranian tankers loaded with crude oil have arrived in India, Bloomberg has reported, in what is the first shipment of Iranian crude to the subcontinent in seven years. The two carry a total of 4 million barrels of oil. The buyers have not been specified, Bloomberg noted. The shipments were made…

title: Oil prices are a growth problem
